hub_subtitle: Inglês do dia a dia — apresentar-se, rotina e conversação

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Ana Paula? -- Introducing Yourself in Everyday English
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself in everyday English -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana Paula?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari | Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana Paula?

listenings.text: Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to our free walking tour of the old town. My name is Daniel, and I am your guide today. Right now, the sun is out, so it is a perfect afternoon to explore. We start here at the main square, and then we walk down to the river. On this tour, I tell you the story of each old building. The whole walk takes about ninety minutes. Please stay together, ask me anything, and enjoy your afternoon with us.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I hope you are having a good week. Listen, this Saturday I am visiting the new history museum downtown, and I would love for you to come with me. They have a wonderful documentary about the city, and afterwards we can walk around the park with your dogs. I am free all afternoon, so we are not in a hurry. Call me back when you get this, and let me know if you can join. Talk soon. Bye!

extra_audio.text: Say hello and introduce yourself with your name. Tell the person where you are from and what you do. Talk about your daily routine and what you are doing these days. Ask the other person a question about their life. Say it was nice to talk and agree to meet again.
